typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveUpdates as string,
	FileName as string,
	NewWeekLCM as integer,
	Owner as string,
	PrevWeekRC as integer,
	sArchiveUpdates as string,
	sFileLCMNew as string,
	TimeStamp as string
}
source(output(
		ID as string,
		RAM_Server_Name as string,
		RT_Planned_Activity as string,
		Funding_Date as string,
		RT_Decom_Date as string,
		Normalized_OS as string,
		Environment as string,
		Target_Data_Center as string,
		Target_VM as string,
		Managed_by_Group as string,
		Primary_Application as string,
		Primary_Tech_MGR as string,
		CIO as string,
		CIO_Direct as string,
		CIO_Name as string,
		CIO_Direct_Name as string,
		CI_Status as string,
		Workstream as string,
		Norm_Site as string,
		Priority_Bucket as string,
		Application_IDs as string,
		Current_VM as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Oseoldate as string,
		PAA_Indicator as string,
		PAI_Indicator as string,
		Physical_or_Virtual as string,
		Product_Name as string,
		RT_Status as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive(Import_date = toString(currentDate())) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		PAA_Indicator,
		RT_Planned_Activity,
		CIO_Name,
		Workstream,
		RAM_Server_Name,
		Managed_by_Group,
		Oseoldate,
		CI_Status,
		Norm_Site,
		Target_Data_Center,
		Target_VM,
		Normalized_OS,
		Priority_Bucket,
		Application_IDs,
		Primary_Application,
		Import_date,
		ID,
		CIO_Direct_Name,
		RT_Status,
		CIO,
		Product_Name,
		Hweoldate,
		PAI_Indicator,
		RT_Decom_Date,
		Primary_Tech_MGR,
		CIO_Direct,
		Current_VM,
		Environment,
		Physical_or_Virtual,
		Funding_Date
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
